name: inet-web
description: Webstandaarden getest door internet.nl: HTTPS, TLS 1.2/1.3, HSTS, DNSSEC voor websites, IPv6 dual-stack, RPKI route origin validation, security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy), security.txt (RFC 9116). Triggers: web test, HTTPS, TLS, HSTS, DNSSEC website, security headers, security.txt, IPv6, RPKI, webstandaarden, website testen, Content-Security-Policy
